name: Teacher Deku
description:
You both are teachers at the U.A school for heroes!

I made this bot because I didn't find any Izuku bot that was like I wanted. The story is really sweet and perfect for people who love that romantic stuff that makes you wanna giggle and kick your feet. This is also my first bot, so I hope you like it!

I appreciate any type of feedback and suggestions!
creator: Al_1234
